desktop.title: GardenSuite - Tea Garden Software That Stops Paper Chaos

headings.text: Run your tea garden.Not your paperwork.
When problems hit, paper makes them worse.
Trusted by 20+ tea estates across 7 regions.
Built only for tea gardens. Backed by Sarbani Associates.
Can I see the daily report from outside the garden?
See it on your own numbers.

imgs.alt: GardenSuite daily report dashboard
Tea garden office overwhelmed with paper registers, wage sheets, and manual record keeping
Five connected stages of a tea garden day: face scan, leaf weighing, record verification, payroll calculation, and daily report
Supervisor using face scan on mobile to verify tea garden worker identity
Digital hanging scale weighing tea leaves with wireless sync to smartphone
Automated payroll workflow connecting attendance, leaf weights, and wage calculations
Tea factory workflow from withering to rolling, drying, packing, and final stock

sections.textStart: Run your tea garden.Not your paperwork. The complete offline software for face attendance, smart weighing, and automated payroll. Book Free Demo See How It Works gardensuite.in/das
The Old Way When problems hit, paper makes them worse. Attendance in one register. Leaf weight in another. Payroll in Excel. When work is spread across paper, mistakes become norma
Real Gardens, Real Results Trusted by 20+ tea estates across 7 regions. Darjeeling Simulbarie T.E.Longview T.E.Dooars Rheabari T.E.Mogulkata T.E.Rahimpur T.E.Terai Atal T.E.Naxalba
Connected Workflow A day with GardenSuite. From the first face scan to the owner's evening report, every step stays connected. 1 Face verified Worker identity confirmed by face sca
The Solution One system. No chasing papers. Attendance, weights, payroll, factory, stores, and the daily report all stay connected. Face Attendance Stop buddy punching, even withou
Why Managers Trust GardenSuite Built only for tea gardens. Backed by Sarbani Associates. GardenSuite is built and supported by Sarbani Associates. Trusted by 20+ tea estates across
Common questions Does it work without internet? Yes. Attendance, weighing, payroll, stores, and factory work offline at the garden. Data syncs when the internet returns.How long do
See it on your own numbers. We will show how GardenSuite handles attendance, weights, payroll, factory, and the daily report. Demo, setup, and training are free. Book Free Demo Ema

Automated Payroll Hazira, PF, bonus, and wages auto-ready.
Factory Accounts Track output and exact factory cost.
Store Management Know stock without chasing registers.
Daily Report See daily numbers on any device.
